name: Yogurt Cooler (Raeta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cucumber lengthways into long strips. This is the traditional way to prepare Raeta.
2. Beat the salt and half the paprika into the yogurt with a fork.
3. Gently combine the cucumber strips with the yogurt.
4. Pour the mixture into a serving bowl.
5. Sprinkle the remaining paprika and mint on top for garnish.
6. Chill in the fridge for 2 hours before serving.
